honest_interpretation: Mock FAIL artifact for validator self-test. The tested endpoints do not all satisfy the scaling law, so the empirical result is FAIL.
hypothesis: For interval [2, N], the minimal bounded witness cap needed for exact prime/composite separation in the factor-certificate graph is the largest prime <= sqrt(N).
success_criteria: PASS if the observed minimal passing prime_max matches the largest prime <= sqrt(N) for every tested endpoint.
